name: ratified decisions (ADR index)
description: Test pyramid = Vitest (unit/integration) + RTL (components) + Playwright (E2E); new behavior ships with tests. Open ADR-0011 before changing the testing strategy.

name: verify:live credential-gated live-smoke gate (ADR-0018 §3)
description: scripts/verify-live.mjs (root 'verify:live') exercises all four external services FOR REAL through the public @resonance/* seams so a green release includes 'live wiring works': model (runAgentStream(creatorInterviewAgent) then await .text, via live resolveModel), embedding (resolveEmbedder().embed then assert 1024 dims), email (resolveMail().sendLoginCode to VERIFY_LIVE_EMAIL_TO via Resend), and DB (createDb() insert then select(eq) then delete a throwaway user row). Credential gate FIRST using process.env only (no imports): required groups are AI (AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY OR ANTHROPIC_API_KEY+VOYAGE_API_KEY), email (RESEND_API_KEY+VERIFY_LIVE_EMAIL_TO), DB (DATABASE_URL); if any group missing it prints 'verify:live SKIPPED — which credentials absent' and exits 0 (safe in the credential-free fast loop / no-secret CI). With creds it runs all four independently, prints a PASS/FAIL line each, exits non-zero on any failure. KEY GOTCHA: the live checks import workspace TS packages, but this repo has strict boundaries (shamefully-hoist=false so root cannot resolve @resonance/*) and no TS runner. Fix: added tsx + @resonance/ai + @resonance/auth + @resonance/db + drizzle-orm@0.45.2 (match db version so drizzle eq/entityKind is cross-instance-compatible) as ROOT devDependencies, and the script registers tsx via a dynamic import of tsx/esm/api register() ONLY on the live path — the skip path imports nothing and runs under the exact 'node scripts/verify-live.mjs' command. Node 24 strips .ts types but cannot resolve TS extensionless relative imports, so tsx is required for the live path. CI: .github/workflows/verify-live.yml runs on schedule(nightly)+workflow_dispatch, passing secrets via env (never in run); a clean no-op/skip without them. .env.example RESONANCE_FAKES block replaced with VERIFY_LIVE_EMAIL_TO + an E2E_HARNESS note.
